name: Assistiv Labs
description: Assistiv Labs — Accessibility / A11y Testing tool for developers

seo.title: Assistiv Labs — Accessibility / A11y Testing
seo.meta_description: Assistiv Labs: Assistiv Labs — Accessibility / A11y Testing tool for developers

when_to_use: Remote screen-reader testing on NVDA, JAWS, and VoiceOver
QA session with real AT users before accessibility audit
Regression testing of new ARIA patterns with screen readers
Cloud-based AT testing without local VM setup
Accessible form validation verified across multiple AT combos

pros: Remote screen reader testing without local setup
Cross-platform access to NVDA, JAWS and VoiceOver
Speeds up QA for teams without assistive tech stations
cons: Narrow use case, not a full a11y suite
Per-seat pricing can add up for larger QA teams
Doesn't replace hands-on testing with real users
review.verdict: Sharp niche tool for remote screen reader QA, worth it for distributed teams that can't ship JAWS licenses.
review.best_for: Distributed QA and a11y engineers testing with screen readers remotely.
review.not_for: Teams wanting automated WCAG scans or monitoring dashboards.
